Guys, Those Who Not Knowing this States , stop blindly trusting PolyMarket showing DMK at 80% 🚨
This is NOT real sentiment. Some Random wallets shares are inflating the numbers. That’s not public opinion , that’s manipulation.
Ground reality is completely different 👇
📊 Recent public discussions, local sentiment, and unofficial polls clearly show momentum shifting towards ADMK (NDA alliance) and Vijay’s TVK.
🔥 Both are leading in buzz, grassroots support and voter mood.
This election is a direct fight between ADMK vs TVK , not DMK.
Tamil Nadu pattern is very clear:
➡️ People don’t repeat the same party easily
➡️ Power alternates between DMK & ADMK
➡️ DMK already ruled the last 5 years
⚠️ That means change is coming.
💥 Either ADMK comes back strong
💥 Or TVK creates a massive upset
But DMK at 80%? That’s far from reality.
👉 Smart money follows ground sentiment, not manipulated markets.
👉 Position yourself early before the shift becomes obvious.
Don’t get trapped. Think smart. Invest smarter.

body: I still wonder how you people are confidently believing TVK won’t win. Even DMK election candidates and DMK supporters don’t have the courage to bet like that. TVK may look like a new party, but they have been doing welfare activities, including during all natural disasters, in a structured way for 20 years under the name Vijay Makkal Iyakkam (VMI). This is the first time they are going to see what they have planted all these years. Most of the election candidates are from the VMI, and they are well known in those places. So, not only the leader’s face, but their activities over all these years will also help them shine. It’s not like other actor-turned-politician parties
all real and true, TVK should be trading at 30c minimum

Hi bro, I completely agree that TVK is an emerging party but I believe that they are going to get 15 - 20 % in all constituencies and either DMK or ADMK will edge them over. The current situation is in such a way that TVK without any alliance will not win a majority.  What seemed to be an easy win for DMK 3 months back has turned into a very tough battle now and the million dollar question is whose vote share is TVK going to eat into and the entire media is clueless about it. My opinion is that ADMK will win with a thin majority and everyone is underestimating them but let's see. This election is going to be one hell of an election.

TN people are not in the mood to welcome BJP, so anyone in alliance with the BJP is already not in the game. Therefore, the only options are DMK and TVK. Still, you are believing in ADMK; I suggest selling ADMK YES and buying DMK NO, since both are almost at the same price. As you believe ADMK will win or as I believe TVK will win, you will be in profit.

AI can’t read crowds from livestreams, but I wonder why many stupid traders also can’t see it and compare the people’s support across each party’s campaign livestreams and videos. Not many days are left until May 4th. Keep buying NO on TVK. I still have some buy orders that are not filled yet 😂

body:
Anyone who thinks TVK is going to become the single largest party in their first ever election is out of their mind. They have very little ground-level infrastructure and only social media hype. 

Sure, they can get 20 seats or something but impossible to become largest party. Even Aam Aadmi Party after 2.5 years of India Against Corruption movement from 2011 to 2013 could not become single largest party in their first state-level election in Delhi 2013

Congratulations. You’re digging your own grave. Keep buying NO shares of TVK 😂😂

If you are not Tamil, I have some advice for you: today is the last day of the election campaign, and the TVK campaign is live on YouTube; you can see the so-called social media hype there.

Also, you can see other parties’ campaigns and the difference: why DMK’s and ADMK’s crowds look like zombies without any enthusiasm, and why the TVK crowd has so much enthusiasm. The only reason is that the TVK crowd is genuine, while DMK is paying a minimum of 200 Rs and ADMK is paying a minimum of 300 Rs per person in their crowds. They are spending so much on advertisements and creating fake narratives and biased polls with crores, but they are treating the crowd with ~$1 per person. 😂😂

Bro like I said, TVK definitely has some pull and they will get a decent vote share and 15-20 seats simply for Vijay's brand name. 

But a 2 year old party with - no experienced party workers, booth level workers, second level leadership - cannot become single largest party in its first ever election only with social media. 

For that to happen there would have to be hatred level anti-incumbency against DMK. The kind that occurs when the ruling party starts killing protesters, jailing opposition leaders, blatantly indulging in large scale corruption etc. 

But that is simply not there. DMK has some normal anti-incumbency sentiment but it not enough for TVK to become single largest party. The "corruption" charges against DMK are not big enough to counter the welfare schemes they have introduced.

And just btw, no party has 100% organic pull in their rallies. None. Every single party pays villagers 500-1000 rupees to come as crowd. So if you think the TVK crowd is 100% organic then you are mistaken.
Your last sentence says that you’re not Tamil and you have no idea about TVK

Sorry, I'm absolutely random guy from the other part of the world, but this is not true. In Hungary, we just had a 70% victory for a party that did not exist 2 years ago, and consists of zero people who were previously in politics, or who held elected positions.

vijay isn't magyar and stalin isn't a dictator like orban. and tamil nadu isn't hungary.

Many people think TVK is a Brand New Party, so it won’t Win this Election.

That’s Not True. Vijay has been the No. 1 actor in Indian cinema for over 30 years. His movies consistently cross ₹200+ crore and he is among the Highest Paid Actors in India even compared to many Bollywood stars.

One thing I firmly believe about Vijay and TVK is this: Vijay is far more knowledgeable than people assume. He understands the public mindset extremely well. If he is 100% confident about winning this election, only then would he have launched the party. He is not here to just participate , he is here to win.

On election day, for the first time in Indian history, people will celebrate it like a family function, welcoming Vijay into politics. Many will wear outfits inspired by him and vote with pride.

This alone is Enough Proof that a Massive Victory is Coming.
